overrides.expect: x _ {i} ^ {+} = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} x _ {i} - \gamma d _ {i}, & \text {for i\in\mathcal {B} with i\neq q ,} \\ 0, & \text {for i = q ,} \\ 0, & \text {for i\in\mathcal {N} with i\neq r ,} \\ \gamma , & \text {for i = r .} \end{array} \right.
overrides.new: x_{i}^{+} = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} x_{i} - \gamma d_{i}, & \text{for }i\in\mathcal{B}\text{ with }i\neq q,\\ 0, & \text{for }i = q,\\ 0, & \text{for }i\in\mathcal{N}\text{ with }i\neq r,\\ \gamma, & \text{for }i = r.\end{array} \right.
